commands.review_summary:
The PR hardens gateway MCP loopback schema generation, skips unreadable tool metadata, gates tools/call on the advertised tool schema, and adds focused gateway tests.

PR surface: Source +95, Tests +195. Total +290 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main directly reads loopback tool name and parameters while building tools/list, so a throwing getter can break schema generation. I did not run the repro because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review of the draft PR and explicit acceptance of the compatibility behavior.

target.title: fix(gateway): quarantine malformed MCP loopback schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- hardens MCP loopback tool schema generation so unreadable tool metadata is omitted instead of breaking `tools/list`
- keeps `tools/call` aligned with the advertised schema so omitted tools cannot be executed by name
- preserves healthy loopback tools when a malformed sibling appears earlier in the tool list

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/gateway/mcp-http.handlers.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.schema.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.handlers.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.schema.ts src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` → clean, overall 0.86
- AWS Crabbox `run_84bb1670ef0e`, lease `cbx_7946f5c49cca`, slug `swift-crab`: `pnpm check:changed` passed; lease cleaned up

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: malformed MCP loopback tool metadata no longer breaks schema listing or makes hidden tools callable.

Real environment tested: local gateway Vitest through `scripts/run-vitest.mjs`; remote Linux AWS Crabbox `c7a.8xlarge` changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/mcp-http.test.ts --reporter=verbose`; `pnpm check:changed` on AWS Crabbox run `run_84bb1670ef0e`.

Evidence after fix: targeted gateway test passed 23 tests, including unreadable tool-name and omitted-schema call-path coverage; remote `pnpm check:changed` exited 0.

Observed result after fix: healthy tools remain listed/callable, unreadable or omitted tools are skipped and return `Tool not available` instead of executing.

What was not tested: full repo-wide test suite; this PR is scoped to the gateway MCP loopback surface and changed-gate coverage.
target.author: vincentkoc
